/CAL:TO DISPO/X:ALL TERMS AND CONDITIONS OF THIS CASE, ARE HARVEY WAIVEREDINTO 15015045/CTORD:PROBATION IN #15001084 IS HEREBY TERMINATED AS UNSUCCESSFUL/

/CAL:TO SET DA MTR/X: AS PART OF A NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION, THE PEOPLE MOVETO DISMISS 15001084 AT TIME OF SENTENCING IN CASE NUMBER 15015045 ON 08-11-15 PURSUANT TO PC 1385,/MO GRTD/X:THE DEFENDANT ENTERS A HARVEY WAIVER, //X:ANY RESTITUTION OR OTHER MATTERS RESULTING FROM DISMISSED CHARGES  MAY BE ADDED AS TERMS AND CONDITIONS OF THE SENTENCE IN 15015045,/CONTD:TO TRAIL 15015045 & TERMINATE AS UNSUCCESSFUL ON 08-11-15/DOP/

/TWS/CTORD  THE SENTENCES IN COUNTS 10 AND 11 ARE IDENTICAL AND TO RUN COCURRENT,/CH7:ISS:CPROB:PROB 3 Y:PJ 70D/CTS:70/WS/VF2:150/PROBREVFN/COA:40/ICNA/COLLECT/RESTV/OBEY/ACCEP/4019HALF/SAORD/SA1: WILFREDO PERLAS, PAULPATALINGHUG, SYDNEY SUNGA/
